Client tracker preview for White Oak Midwifery

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for White Oak Midwifery: A simple Notion workspace to move each family from first message through the consult, intake, prenatal cadence, homebirth on-call window, and six weeks of postpartum visits without leaving the paper chart behind.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

love-based practice providing individualized care to anyone with a low-risk pregnancy, hour-long home visits starting in the first trimester, six weeks of postpartum care at home for mother and baby, please call, message, or email me via the website

Today ops snapshot Prenatal + birth + postpartum board Family record Consult + Intake view Prenatal cadence + on-call window Postpartum visit + newborn care view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every inquiry from the site contact form lands in one intake queue, not a phone-message backlog.
  • Monthly-then-weekly prenatal cadence and the 37-42 week on-call window live on a single timeline.
  • Six postpartum home visits and newborn exams are tracked against their dates so nothing slips in the first six weeks.

1. Today ops snapshot

Today ops snapshot

A single snapshot of whose prenatal visit is this week, who is inside the 37-42 week on-call window, and which postpartum visits are due.

Open this view

2. Prenatal + birth + postpartum board

Prenatal + birth + postpartum board

Every family moves left to right: Inquiry -> Consult -> Intake -> Prenatal cadence -> On-call -> Postpartum 6wk, so nothing lives only on a phone-message pad.

Open this view

3. Family record

Family record

One page per family with EDD, gestational age, care type, previous births, pay method (cash / sliding scale), and GBS + lab status.

Open this view

4. Consult + Intake view

Consult + Intake view

Turns 'please call, message, or email me via the website' into a structured inquiry -> in-person consult -> intake flow with medical-history and insurance fields ready.

Open this view

5. Prenatal cadence + on-call window

Prenatal cadence + on-call window

Monthly visits through 28w, biweekly through 36w, weekly into the 37-42 week on-call window, all against one EDD timeline.

Open this view

6. Postpartum visit + newborn care view

Postpartum visit + newborn care view

The six-week postpartum cadence (24h / 1wk / 2wk / 4wk / 6wk) plus newborn exam, PKU, and weight checks all in one follow-up list.

Open this view

Setup map

How the contact form, consult, intake, prenatal cadence, on-call window, and postpartum visits connect as one workflow instead of six separate paper threads.
